TriggerProps.Name: tI_ORDER_ITEM3
TriggerProps.Trigger_Body:
CREATE TRIGGER tI_ORDER AFTER INSERT ON ORDER_ITEM REFERENCING NEW AS NEW FOR EACH ROW MODE DB2SQL WHEN ((0 = (SELECT count(*) FROM APP.PRODUCT WHERE new.product_id = APP.PRODUCT.product_id)) ) BEGIN ATOMIC SIGNAL SQLSTATE '75001' ('Cannot insert SALES.ORDER_ITEM because APP.PRODUCT does not exist.'); END !!
CREATE TRIGGER tI_ORDER AFTER INSERT ON ORDER_ITEM REFERENCING NEW AS NEW FOR EACH ROW MODE DB2SQL WHEN ((0 = (SELECT count(*) FROM APP.ORDERS WHERE new.order_id = APP.ORDERS.order_id)) ) BEGIN ATOMIC SIGNAL SQLSTATE '75001' ('Cannot insert SALES.ORDER_ITEM because APP.ORDERS does not exist.'); END !!

Trigger_TemplateProps.Name: PARENT UPDATE RESTRICT
PARENT UPDATE CASCADE
Trigger_TemplateProps.Template_Code: UPDATE %Child SET %JoinFKPK(%Child,%New," = ",",") WHERE %JoinFKPK(%Child,%Old," = "," AND")

Trigger_TemplateProps.Name: PARENT UPDATE SET NULL
Trigger_TemplateProps.Template_Code: UPDATE %Child SET %SetFK(%Child,NULL) WHERE %JoinFKPK(%Child,%Old," = "," AND")

Trigger_TemplateProps.Name: PARENT DELETE RESTRICT
PARENT DELETE CASCADE
Trigger_TemplateProps.Template_Code: DELETE FROM %Child WHERE %JoinFKPK(%Child,%Old," = "," AND")

Trigger_TemplateProps.Name: PARENT DELETE SET NULL
Trigger_TemplateProps.Template_Code: UPDATE %Child SET %SetFK(%Child,NULL) WHERE %JoinFKPK(%Child,%Old," = "," AND")

Trigger_TemplateProps.Name: CHILD INSERT RESTRICT
CHILD INSERT CASCADE
Trigger_TemplateProps.Template_Code: INSERT INTO %Parent (%ParentPK(",",)) SELECT %ChildFK(",",) FROM %New WHERE %NotnullFK(%New," IS NOT NULL",," AND") AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT * FROM %Parent WHERE %JoinFKPK(%New,%Parent," = "," AND"))

Trigger_TemplateProps.Name: CHILD INSERT SET NULL
Trigger_TemplateProps.Template_Code: UPDATE %Child SET %SetFK(%Child,NULL) WHERE NOT EXISTS ( SELECT * FROM %Parent WHERE %JoinFKPK(%New,%Parent," = "," AND") )

Trigger_TemplateProps.Name: CHILD UPDATE RESTRICT
CHILD UPDATE CASCADE

Trigger_TemplateProps.Template_Code: UPDATE %Child SET %SetFK(%Child,NULL) WHERE NOT EXISTS ( SELECT * FROM %Parent WHERE %JoinFKPK(%New,%Parent," = "," AND") )

Trigger_TemplateProps.Template_Code: DELETE FROM %Parent WHERE %JoinFKPK(%Old,%Parent," = "," AND")
